name: Mongolian Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb across grain into thin slices.
2. In a bowl, combine 1 tablespoon each of soy sauce, cornstarch, and garlic; stir in the lamb. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. In another bowl, mix the remaining soy sauce, 3/4 cup water, and the next 4 ingredients (the rest of the cornstarch, sesame seeds, sugar, crushed red pepper). Set aside.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add the lamb and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the lamb and soy sauce mixture; cook and stir until the sauce boils and thickens.
Source: A PARADE OF CHINESE SPECIALTIES
